content.en:
Time flies, Ye Tian has collected a large number of resources in the Ten Directions Black Domain, and he has obtained hundreds of Extreme Dao Treasures alone, and there are even more fragments of Extreme Dao Treasures.

And Ye Tian also found some palaces, but the palaces were shrouded in a magic circle and could not be opened for a while.

But this piece of heaven and earth has been shattered, so it directly intercepted the fragments of heaven and earth and directly took away the area where the palace was located.

Anyway, the Ten Directions Black Domain couldn't stop him.

He took away these places that could not be analyzed for the time being, and went back to analyze them slowly.

......

Somewhere in the Black Domain of the Ten Directions.

The Lord of the White Night, the Lord of the Golden Body, the Lord of Destruction, and the Lord of the Northern Underworld, the four perfect controllers of the Extreme Realm, gathered here, and their expressions were not very good-looking.

"Lord of the White Night, I haven't had much to gain lately, what about you?" asked the Lord of the Golden Body.

"I didn't have much to gain, I sneaked into a lot of places, and found that the treasures of many places seemed to have been taken away during this period of time, did you do it?" asked the Lord of the White Night.

"I also noticed that many treasures suddenly disappeared, but we agreed before, if they are valuable treasures, and they are all useful to us, we can use them for mutual understanding. "

"But it's not you, who is that?The cultivators of the Ten Directions Black Domain can only cultivate to a high level of perfection in the end, and they can't even comprehend the Extreme Dao, and they can't even touch the power of the Extreme Dao. But these treasures are gone, it can't be that they did it! Could it be that there are other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers entering here?"

"It's not us, it can't be the Lord of the Unbounded, right? The Lord of the Unbounded has no interest in ordinary treasures, and everything that is valuable to him in the Ten Directions Black Domain has been taken away by him. And the existence of the Ten Directions Black Domain and the token to enter here are all left to us by him, and it is impossible to compete with us for these treasures. "

"Of course it's not the Lord of the Unbounded, but it's not ours, where did that thing go?"

"Could it be that the Abyss Palace Master followed us here?"

"Abyss Palace Master?can't be, if it was really him, those extreme creatures would definitely come here one by one, and with the style of the Abyss Palace Master, he would definitely find a way to invade this place, instead of sneaking around to find treasures. "

"Let's talk to the Lord of the Boundless about this matter, in case it is some powerful existence of the Primordial Black Sea, which leads to tracking down to the end of the realm, then the location of the edge of the realm is exposed. "

"Alright, let's inform the Lord of the Unbounded!"

The Lord of the Golden Body immediately went back, and then contacted the Lord of the Unbounded.

The End of the World.

The Lord of the Boundaries has returned, and in fact he has been in retreat at an ashram in the Primordial Black Sea recently, so after receiving the summons from the Lord of the Golden Body, he immediately came to the end of the realm.

"Is something wrong?"

The Unbounded Lord asked.

Immediately, the Lord of the Golden Body told them about the situation in the Ten Directions Black Domain.

"Hey, besides you, are there other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers who have infiltrated the Ten Directions Black Domain?" the Unbounded Lord said in surprise.

"We guess so!"

The Lord of the Golden Body nodded.

"Let's go, I'll take you over to see, if there is, the other party will definitely not be able to avoid my detection!" said the Unbounded Lord confidently.

After all, he has continuously comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao, and he has also raised the Extreme Space-Time Pole to the real limit, as well as mastered many powerful secret techniques, and even has several weapons in his hand that surpass the Extreme Path Treasures, even if he comprehends the existence of the Extreme Space-Time Pole, he can't avoid his detection.

Soon, the Lord of the Unbounded also came to the Ten Directions Black Domain.

Rumble!

The power of the Unbounded Lord began to probe the entire Ten Directions Black Domain.

......

Ye Tian was happily looking for one treasure after another, although there were not many treasures in the Ten Directions Black Domain, but if he searched carefully, he could still find them.

But suddenly, Ye Tian's face changed.

"Not good!"

He knew that he was locked, a strong man far beyond him had come to the Ten Directions Black Domain, and had definitely comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Extreme Dao, otherwise he wouldn't have sensed it now.

Before he could leave, a figure appeared in front of him, along with several familiar figures.

"The Lord of the Unbounded, the Lord of the Golden Body, the Lord of the White Night, the Lord of Destruction, the Lord of the Northern Underworld, hello!"

Ye Tian said embarrassedly.

"The Endless Lord of the Daoless Tower, it's you!"

The Lord of the White Night was shocked.

He naturally knew Ye Tian, after all, Ye Tian had also come to Jidao Zhenhe to help before, and he had also traded the causal purple flower with Ye Tian.

"The perfect controller of the True Realm, Strange, it seems that you have comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole Dao, otherwise you would not have come here silently. "The Unbounded Lord's Way.

"Endless Lord, he has comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole?"

The Lord of the Golden Body was stunned.

None of them comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole, either they only comprehended the Extreme Space-Time Pole, or they only comprehended the Extreme Space Pole, and they were still a little bit away from comprehending the Extreme Space-Time Pole.

But now that the Lord of the Boundless said that Ye Tian had comprehended the Extreme Dao of Extreme Time and Space, wouldn't he have surpassed them, how could they not be shocked.

"Lord of Infinity, you shouldn't know that this place exists, why is it here?"

The Lord of the White Night asked.

Ye Tian said casually: "I was casually strolling around the Primordial Black Sea, and suddenly I sensed the fluctuations of the Ten Directions Black Domain, so I escaped here to look for treasures. "

"Nonsense, the primordial Black Sea is endless, how could you just happen to find here!" The Lord of the Golden Body said in disbelief, "You must still be following us!"

"Forget it, even if the Lord of Endless follows him, that's his ability!" said the Lord of the Unbounded.

If it had been before, he might have maintained the Extreme Realm Perfect Controller of the Extreme Dao True River, after all, he was a member of the Extreme True River, but now his state of mind had risen to a level.

In his opinion, Ye Tian is also a member of the end of the world, and they are all his own people.

It's just that he gives more priority to taking care of the cultivators of the Extreme Dao True River, but since Ye Tian has found this place, then he won't do anything to Ye Tian.

"Endless Lord, you've reaped a lot of benefits here, so forget it, and leave a little good stuff for the other Extreme Realm Perfect Controllers at the End of the Realm!" said the Boundless Lord.

"Okay, I'll listen to the Lord of the Unbounded, and I'm not looking for treasures here!"

Ye Tian said.

Anyway, his gains are enough, even if he gives up now, it doesn't matter.

Subsequently, Ye Tian followed the Lord of the Boundless and left.

Just as Ye Tian was about to return to the end of the realm, the Lord of the Boundless said, "Lord of Endless, are you interested in going to my dojo to sit down?"
